About Dorcas Ventures

Ghana's Home of Quality Plasters

We are a premier supplier of top-tier plastering and ceiling materials, serving homeowners, contractors, and developers across Ghana with excellence and reliability.

From premium POP cement to designer fibre ceilings, every product we offer meets the highest quality standards — because your home deserves nothing less.

🏆
Premium Quality
Top-grade certified materials
🚚
Fast Delivery
Nationwide supply network
💡
Expert Guidance
Free design consultation
🤝
Trusted Partners
500+ satisfied clients
Founder & CEO
Leadership

Meet Aduhene Seth

Founder & Chief Executive Officer

Aduhene Seth is the visionary founder behind Dorcas Ventures — Ghana's premier destination for premium plastering and ceiling materials. With over a decade of hands-on experience in the construction and interior finishing industry, he has built the company from the ground up with a single mission: delivering quality that speaks for itself.

His deep understanding of the Ghanaian market, combined with an uncompromising commitment to excellence, has made Dorcas Ventures the trusted partner of choice for homeowners, contractors, and developers across the country.

"We don't just sell materials — we help people build homes they are proud of. Quality is not a feature, it is our standard."
10+Years Experience
500+Projects Led
200+Happy Clients
Our Products
Materials Built for Excellence
Bestseller

POP Cement

High-strength plaster of paris cement formulated for smooth, crack-resistant wall and ceiling finishes. Available in multiple grades.

Premium

Fibre & Gypsum Boards

Lightweight, moisture-resistant fibre and gypsum ceiling boards for both residential and commercial interiors.

Custom

Designer Ceiling Systems

Pre-fabricated POP cornices, medallions, and bespoke ceiling systems to elevate any interior space.

What We Do
Services We Offer
01

Material Supply

Comprehensive supply of all plastering, ceiling, and finishing materials with quality guarantee.

02

Ceiling Installation

Professional POP and fibre ceiling installation by our skilled artisan team.

03

Design Consultation

Free consultation to help you select designs that complement your interior and budget.

04

Bulk & Project Supply

Reliable bulk supply for large-scale construction and development projects across Ghana.
